intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 15:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 75% for 15:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting strong. 4 reps to go. The first one sets your standard for the rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 1/4. Target: 112% FTP, 90-95 rpm, Seated. Don't overshoot first 30s — settle in smoothly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Beginning strong. 8:00 at 112%. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Starting fresh. Your body thinks this is fun. We'll check back in 8:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First interval: 8:00 at 106-112%. Settle in, don't overcook it.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 23 minutes of work done. 44 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 8:00 at 112%. You're building something here. Suffering is the price of admission.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 38% through session. Rep 2/4. You've done 8min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/4. You're building something real here. 2 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 38% complete. Rep 2/4. Fatigue is real — hold form. 112%, 95-100 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 5:00. Then 31min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 56% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 56% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 56% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 56% done. 112% for 8:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 68% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 68% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 68% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 68% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 5:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 112%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 8:00 at 112%. Then 10min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep! 8:00 at 112%. Leave nothing in reserve. You'll be cooling down in 10 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Same power as last time, but you're way more tired. Progressive overload! *cries in watts*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 112% × 8:00. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 86% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 86% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 86% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 86% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
